initial_entry.name: Linter
initial_entry.author: Victor Tao
initial_entry.description: This Obsidian plugin applies consistent styling to your markdown files.

current_entry.name: Linter
current_entry.author: Victor Tao
current_entry.description: Format and style your notes. Linter can be used to format YAML tags, aliases, arrays, and metadata; footnotes; headings; spacing; math blocks; regular Markdown contents like list, italics, and bold styles; and more with the use of custom rule options.
